heading: The Talk of the Town
description: The New Yorker's Talk of the Town, fetched verbatim via authenticated Jina reader. Traversed backwards in time — most recent first, each article featured once and never repeated.

covered.title: Pay Later
covered.author_or_venue: E. Tammy Kim / The New Yorker
covered.one_line_summary: E. Tammy Kim on deferred financial pain — buy-now-pay-later economy and its structural costs to working families.

covered.title: Bird Flu / Canada Geese piece
covered.one_line_summary: Talk of the Town piece on avian flu spread via migratory Canada geese — ecological anxiety in the urban-wild interface.

covered.title: When Soul Food Met Daniel Boulud
